summary: Current value=1 at baseline floor after execution spike. Decrease impossible, increase requires catalyst. DC ~95%.
content: Charles Victor Thompson was executed Jan 28, 2026 in Texas. Google Trends spiked to 100 on Jan 29, decayed rapidly to baseline by Feb 1. Current value on Feb 5 is 1. Change_stats: no_change 92.2%, increase 3.3%, decrease 4.4%. With value=1 and ±3 threshold, decrease is mathematically impossible (can't go below 0), and DC covers [0,4] which captures all baseline noise. Only a new news catalyst could push above 4.
